headline: Intel (INTC) Is Up 23.3% After Advancing AI Chip Packaging Talks With Google and Amazon

This push into high-margin, AI-focused packaging services could be a turning point for Intel’s foundry ambitions by attracting hyperscale cloud customers seeking alternatives to existing manufacturing partners.
